title: Great Big World [OLD]
description: Aspen Forests, Swamp Pyramids, Tropical Islands, and much, much more!
body:
# Where did Great Big World go?
I was unsatisfied with how the project was turning- particularly because you can only create a certain kind of experience by _adding_ new features to the game. I want to create a unique experience for players, which requires looking at every aspect of vanilla, tweaking or removing features that don't fit within my vision. Great Big World has been moved [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world). It is now a complete overhaul mod (also called an "alternate timeline" mod) for modern Minecraft. Check it out, because many features from the old mod will eventually be added there!


![GBW Banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/466430024149630988/1115504174763876432/image-1.png_14-1.png.png)
## **There's a whole world out there to explore.**

~~**Great Big World** is an adventure & world generation mod that currently adds the Aspen Forest, Moose, Swamp Pyramid, Wooden Masks, Tropical Islands, Nautilus, & Lighthouses to the game, along with some other features.~~


---
![1.0 Update Promo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/466430024149630988/1105781767119568896/983f42eb6c138fcdf7bd3bc0aa64fbc739c01ca8.webp)
~~### In 1.0:~~

~~**Aspen Forests** are cold biomes that generate near Taigas and regular forests. They also have a Snowy counterpart, which generates near Snowy Taigas.~~

~~**Moose** are a new tameable mob that is easily angerable. They will turn on you if you cause them harm. However, if you manage to tame & ride one, they are quite powerful! Moose are also a great source of meat.~~

~~**Glimmering Mushrooms** generate in Caves & Mega Taigas. They will change color and light level based on the time of day, or if they are underground. Brewing them will yield Darkness, Blindness, or Glowing Potions. They can be further brewed into Aura Potions!~~

~~**Mahogany Trees** are tropical trees that generate in Jungles to provide a little more diversity.~~

~~**Bamboo Torches** are a new Torch variant that can be placed on Leaves. Great for natural looking builds!~~

---
![1.1 Update Promo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/466430024149630988/1105781766679187536/4904a958443053aeb51533cced920d820947dc60.webp)
~~### In 1.1:~~

~~**Swamp Pyramids** are an ancient structure generating in Mangrove Swamps, guarded by Thickets and traps!~~

~~**Thickets** are a new monster which must be disturbed to activate.~~

~~**Wooden Masks** are a new helmet item which can be enchanted with two unique enchantments instead of Aqua Affinity & Respiration.~~

~~**Cobblestone Bricks** are a new decorative block that make up Swamp Pyarmids. They can be crafted with 4 Cobblestone.~~

---
![1.2 Update Promo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/466430024149630988/1105781766293299260/a1096cad3016b013bf0da2c02a3510faa3c1c4d6.webp)
~~### In 1.2:~~

~~**Lighthouses** are a new structure located in Stony Shores. They contain the new Stained Calcite blocks as well as some loot.~~

~~**Tropical Islands** are a rare new island biome that takes the place of Mushroom Islands in warmer temperatures. They consist of Beaches, Jungles, Volcanic Peaks, and sometimes Mangrove Swamps.~~

~~**Acai Trees** are a new tree found in Jungles, Mangrove Swamps, and Island Jungles. **Acai Berries**, a new food source, grow on the side of their trunks.~~

~~The **Nautilus** is a new ocean mob that gets scared of others. If killed, it drops a Nautilus Shell, but it can also be transported away via Bucket in order to speed up Copper oxidation!~~

~~**Beachgrass** is a new vegetation found in Beach biomes.~~

~~**Thatch** is a new highly flammable decorative block crafted using either Beachgrass, Grass, or Bamboo.~~

---
~~Be sure to check out the Gallery for pictures of the features!~~

~~Great Big World requires [**Terrablender**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender).
It ships with [**Creo Lib**](https://modrinth.com/mod/creo-lib) to allow for more amazing features!~~

~~## **Questions**~~

~~**Modpacks? Videos?** Feel free to add Great Big World to your modpacks, or make videos about it! But be sure to give credit and not to claim it as your own.~~

~~**Backports? Forge?** Backports most likely will not happen. I am one guy with only so much time on his hands. Great Big World will be updated for the latest version of Minecraft. I am interested in porting to Forge in the future, but don't expect that to happen any time soon.~~
